title: Kidomo Kids Club
shortDesc: Bright, Montessori-leaning indoor play space with board games, sensory play, crafting and books — fully staffed drop-off.
description: Kidomo Kids Club is one of Koh Samui's best supervised drop-off play spaces. The clean, air-conditioned space features magnetic tiles, sensory play zones, crafting corners, imaginative play areas and books — all curated with a Montessori approach. Staff engage actively with children so parents can enjoy a coffee break nearby. Adults enter free. A 10-hour punch card makes regular visits great value.
